description_long: This is a dark wooden cabinet with a rectangular tabletop and four straight legs. The front features two central drawers stacked vertically, each with a small round metallic knob, flanked by two open shelves on either side. The lower section includes a wide, open shelf that spans the width of the cabinet, providing additional storage or display space. The wood has a rich, deep brown finish with a subtle grain pattern, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front is designed for easy access to storage compartments. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban interiors such as entryways, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden cabinet with two central drawers, open side shelves, and a lower open shelf, featuring a classic and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two central drawers with knobs, open shelves on both sides, and a lower open shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid panel side and the depth of the cabinet, with the lower shelf partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid back panel and the lower open shelf, with no visible drawers or shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and lower shelf.
